author: msjsc001
description: Render UUID-based block references and block embeds from Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: msjsc001
manifest.description: Render and navigate UUID-based block references and block embeds in Live Preview and Reading Mode, with Logseq-style outlines, property hiding, source badges, backlinks, and local indexing.
manifest.name: Block Reference Enhancer

name: Block Reference Enhancer

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Fixed compatibility for outline blocks that contain fenced code blocks inside list structures
- Fixed cases where some notes would not render block references, block embeds, or hidden property lines until the plugin cache was fully rebuilt
- Automatically invalidate outdated local block-index caches and trigger a full rebuild after parser upgrades
- Improved source badge behavior and reduced duplicate badge rendering in rendered views

## Improved

- Added `Back` and `Delete` action buttons for rendered block references and block embeds
- Improved rendered-reference interaction behavior in Live Preview
- Updated English and Chinese documentation
- Clarified that the Obsidian default theme is the compatibility baseline for this plugin, and other themes are not guaranteed to render or behave correctly

## Notes

- Version updated to `1.3.8`
- Release assets: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## 1.3.7

### Fixed
- Fixed Logseq-style fenced code block compatibility inside list items
- Restored block reference rendering, block embed rendering, and property hiding for affected pages that were previously skipped after fenced code sections
- Added automatic cache invalidation and full rebuild when older parser results are no longer compatible

### Improved
- The plugin now detects outdated local index caches automatically after parser upgrades
- Users no longer need to manually delete `data.json`, remove the plugin folder, or run `Rebuild block reference index` first after this parser compatibility upgrade

### Notes
- This release performs a one-time full rebuild automatically when an older incompatible cache is detected
- After the rebuild completes, later startups return to normal cached loading and incremental updates

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Make `Enter` create a first child block when hidden Logseq-style property lines are enabled
- Keep hidden property lines, continuation text, fenced blocks, and existing child trees attached to the parent block
- Support splitting list-item body text at the cursor so the right side becomes the new child block content

## Changed

- Restore `Hide Logseq-style property lines` to on by default for new installs while preserving existing saved settings
- Update Chinese and English documentation
- Expand the recommended companion plugin section
- Refresh the roadmap and remove the completed right-click source creation item

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Stabilized hidden Logseq-style property lines during editing so they no longer flash back into view while typing.
- Stabilized source block reference-count badges during editing so they stay aligned with their source blocks.
- Fixed inconsistent unordered-list marker rendering inside block embeds.

## Notes

- Version bumped to 1.3.4.
- No changes to block reference syntax, block embed syntax, existing settings, or stored note content.

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Improved

- Added outline-aware context previews to the source reference badge popover.
- Reference and embed results now show the current list item plus available parent and child list context.
- Hidden Logseq-style property lines are excluded from popover context previews.

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## 1.3.2

### Fixed
- Rename the settings page heading to a neutral title so the community plugin review no longer flags the plugin name inside settings headings

### Notes
- This is a minimal review-compatibility release
- No plugin behavior, commands, index logic, cache logic, or rendering behavior changed

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## 1.3.1

### Fixed
- Refresh block references and embeds automatically after a source block is saved
- Prefer the most recently modified active source block when the same UUID exists in multiple source locations

### Improved
- Added help/support entry points and issue templates
- Updated Chinese and English documentation for saved-source synchronization behavior

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Add Logseq-style property-line hiding for unordered-list blocks in Live Preview and Reading Mode.
- Add plugin settings for hidden property keys, including exact-key and prefix-key rules.
- Update Chinese and English documentation for property hiding behavior and default rules.

## Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Added editor context menu actions for the current outline block: Copy block reference and Copy block embed.
- The new context menu actions reuse the existing id:: uuid when present and only create a new UUID when the current block does not already have one.
- Updated the Chinese and English documentation to describe the new right-click workflow.
- Added handoff planning documents for the context menu workflow and the future block-search roadmap.
## Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Added Copy current block embed to copy {{embed ((uuid))}} for the current source block.
- Block copy commands now reuse an existing id:: uuid instead of generating a new UUID when the source block already has one.
- Added a hover-only Back button for rendered block references and embeds so they can jump back to their source blocks.
- When the same UUID has multiple active source blocks, the plugin now opens a selection menu before jumping.
- Updated the Chinese and English documentation for the new commands, source navigation, and current plugin behavior.
## Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: msjsc001
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Improved cross-window and popup compatibility in the editor and reference popover.
- Refined block rendering, source-reference badge, and related DOM utility behavior.
- Updated Chinese and English documentation for current plugin usage and release guidance.
- Localized plan documents and added a contributing guide.

## Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.description:
